prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约77名、62名、85名、109名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约109名，较2024年下降约24名，为近年最低点；2025年物理类计划57人，2026年计划60人，扩招3人（+5.26%），扩招幅度温和，对竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 清华大学为985、211、双一流高校，软 科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第1名，学校层次为全国最高；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及食堂管理、校园开放等非核心问题，影响有限；抖音热度排名 第2（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高企；清华大学拥有约40个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、机械工程、材料科学 与工程、临床医学等均为A+，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等清华优势专业持续高热推荐；本省202 6年考生总数约53.5万人，较2025年约46.3万人增加约15.6%，物理类估算约32.9万人，较2025年28.5万人增加约15.5%，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+3人）及本省物理类考生大幅增加（+15.5%），考生增量效应超过扩招缓解效应，预计竞争略加剧；预测最低 位次约107名，区间57–157名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、计算机科学实验班）
- 工科试验班（无穹书院）（含人工智能等专业）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息科学与技术）

- 临床医学类（协和）（八年制）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（57–157名）内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如57名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（计算机类、无穹书 院）；位次接近区间上限（157名附近）建议以三档专业为主，稳妥报考。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 77, 62, 85, and 109 respectively, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The baseline for 2025 is about 109, a decrease of about 24 from 2024, marking the lowest point in recent years. The 2025 Physics Category enrollment plan is 57 students, and the 2026 plan is 60 students, an increase of 3 students (+5.26%). The expansion is moderate, slightly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tsinghua University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 1st in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings for many years, making it the highest-level university in the country. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving non-core issues such as cafeteria management and campus openness, with limited impact. It ranks 2nd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure and sustained high application attention. Tsinghua University has about 40 A- or above disciplines, among which Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Clinical Medicine are all A+, with top-tier national disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tsinghua's advantageous majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% from approximately 463,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 329,000, an increase of about 15.5% from 285,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation and backward trend, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+3 students), and the significant increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (+15.5%), the candidate increase effect outweighs the expansion mitigation effect, leading to slightly intensified competition. The predicted minimum ranking is about 107, with a range of 57–157.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Computer Science Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wuqiong Academy) (including Artificial Intelligence and other majors)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Science and Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation (including Automation, Information Management and Information Systems)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Weixian Academy) (including Cross-Disciplinary Engineering, etc.)
- Clinical Medicine (Peking Union Medical College) (Eight-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Architecture, Planning, Landscape) (including Cross-Disciplinary Engineering, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Zhishan Academy) (including Statistics, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Shuimu Academy) (including Cross-Disciplinary Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (57–157), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 57), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Wuqiong Academy). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 157), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors for a safe application.
